title: God Equipment
description: A datapack that adds new overpowered equipment, including a god elytra, sword, and set of netherite armor.
body: This mod adds a new tier of God Equipment designed to surpass all of the existing gear that is inside of base Minecraft. Each armor piece provides extreme protection against projectiles, fire, explosions, and general damage, stacking beyond standard protection enchantments. The equipment is crafted using rare materials, including four netherite blocks and four nether stars for each piece of equipment. Designed for endgame progression, this gear is solely designed for players seeking the maximum amount of survivability and power in their Minecraft worlds.
